name: New Mexico In Focus, a Production of NMPBS

episodes.title: NM Epstein Truth Commission Chair on Scope of Investigation
episodes.description:
3.6.26 – Earlier this year, the state House of Representatives unanimously approved a resolution creating a subcommittee to investigate possible crimes committed at Jeffrey Epstein's former Zorro Ranch in Northern New Mexico. Democratic Rep. Andrea Romero chairs this new group, now known as the "Epstein Truth Commission." Romero recently joined Senior Producer Lou DiVizio to explain the commission's work, and why she believes New Mexicans deserve to know the truth. 

Correspondent: 
Lou DiVizio 

Guest: 
NM Rep. Andrea Romero, D-Santa Fe; Epstein Truth Commission Chair   

For More Information: 
https://www.abqjournal.com/news/epstein-truth-finding-commission-plans-to-start-issuing-subpoenas-to-persons-of-interest/2982720
